entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A grain legume crop affected by the pod borer pest

entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of crops including pigeonpea that are targeted by Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A damaging insect pest known as the pod borer that affects grain legumes

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographical region where Helicoverpa armigera is a significant pest

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist attack or damage by a pest

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A component of host plant resistance that adversely affects the biology of the insect pest

entities.name: BIOASSAY
entities.description: A standardized experimental procedure used to assess the antibiosis component of resistance

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL DIET
entities.description: A synthetic medium used to rear insects and test the effects of plant components

entities.name: LYOPHILIZATION
entities.description: The process of freeze-drying plant leaves and pods for incorporation into an artificial diet

entities.name: LARVAL MORTALITY
entities.description: The rate of death of larvae used as a metric to assess antibiosis

entities.name: LARVAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of larvae used as a metric to assess antibiosis

entities.name: PUPAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of pupae used as a metric to assess antibiosis

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The successful transition of pupae to adults used as a metric to assess antibiosis

entities.name: DURATION OF DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The time taken for larvae and pupae to develop used as a metric to assess antibiosis
